title: NextPack
description: A big Client-side modpack with many convenient QoL mods.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b2733f9186724f82ae7b3a838c435ceae92872_0.webp)

### A big client-side modpack with many Quality-of-Life mod for Minecraft.

Based on Minecraft 1.21.3 with Fabric Loader and has 91 mods.
Based on Sodium + Iris, NextPack won't support OptiFine. But it supports any resourcepacks that requires OptiFine. (Actually 6.1 DOES NOT support CIT, just wait till CIT Resewn will be available for 1.21.3)

<details><summary>⚠️  Has few mods for which you can be banned on server</summary>
  
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/Nv2fQJo5)
- AutoTotem [(Inventory Profiles Next)](https://modrinth.com/mod/O7RBXm3n)
</details>

<details><summary>Added</summary>

- Saturation bar [(AppleSkin)](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV)
- Player heads in chat based on sender [(ChatHeads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wb5oqrBJ)
- Quick item search in chests [(ChestTracker)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ni4SrKmq)
- HUD with armor, inventory, and tool information [(uku's Armor HUD)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wF189hn9)
- Quick sorting of items in containers [(IPN, press R key to sort)](https://modrinth.com/mod/O7RBXm3n)
- Shader support [(Iris Shaders)](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U)
- Block information display at top of screen [(Jade)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvQzSEkH)
- Dynamic lights [(LambdaDynamicLights)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yBW8D80W)
- Zoom on "Z" key [(Ok Boomer)](https://modrinth.com/mod/SOLWeImS)
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/Nv2fQJo5)
- Exclusive Discord RPC [(Simple RPC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ObXSoyrn)
- Ability to join servers on newer or older versions [(ViaFabricPlus)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rIC2XJV4)
- World map on "M" key [(Xaero's World Map)](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym)
- Player ping display in the tab menu [(Better Ping Display)](https://modrinth.com/mod/MS1ZMyR7)
</details>

<details><summary>Improvements</summary>

- Chat appearance [(Chat Imperssive Animation)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-impressive-animation)
- F3 menu [(BetterF3)](https://modrinth.com/mod/8shC1gFX)
- Language selection menu [(LanguageReload)](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6)
- Inventory interaction with the mouse [(Mouse Tweaks)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq)
- Food eating animations [(Eating Animation)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- Explosion animations [(Explosive Enhancement)](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)
</details>

<details><summary>Tweaks</summary>

- Reduced block placement delay for faster and more convenient building [(Accurate Block Placement)](https://modrinth.com/mod/kzwxhsjp)
- Removed resource reload screen [(RRLS)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rrls)
- Screenshots are now automatically copied to the clipboard [(Copyshot)](https://modrinth.com/mod/77SktgmK)
</details>


#### FAQ
Q: *Something went wrong / Modpack Crashes!*
— DM me on Discord — @thesh1xx

<details><summary>Key map</summary>
  
#### World Map
- M — Open

#### Shaders
- B — Toggle shaders
- N — Shaders list

#### Other
- J — Cycle CustomHud Profiles (FPS / FPS+Ping / Hide)
- R — Sort your Inventory 
</details>

#### Credits 6.1
- THESH1XX (author)
- Vealse (Tester)
- waskord (Tester)
